entry.title: Do not allow to do the Putaway for the HU , if the GR is not done
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

I have a business requirement , where we don't want the Put-away to be allowed for the HU for which GR is not done.

This has to be done for a particular one warehouse and that too for production HU. Procurement from supplier process should remain unaffected.

I have tried using the HU User status and it works fine . But customer is looking for any other alternative solution.

Appreciate , if you can help

Thanks 

Sanjay

entry.title: Re: LTMC for Master Data Step by Step Process
entry.content: What value should I give in case of Internal Number Range?

entry.title: Re: Business Data Validation of Custom Reports using Data Transition Validation (DTV) tool
entry.content:
Hi Bjansen,

Regarding the RFITEMGL further splitting of data, you can achieve further granularity by using G/L Account and Posting date as well. 

Thanks

Abhya

entry.title: Re: Volunteering and the Importance of Giving Back
entry.content:
Dear @KatherineKenneally ,

I wanted to express my appreciation for your insightful post on the importance of giving back through volunteering. Your reflections resonate deeply, highlighting how acts of service not only benefit communities but also enrich our own lives. Your dedication to fostering a culture of empathy and community engagement within the SAP Community is truly inspiring. Thank you for shedding light on this vital topic and encouraging us all to contribute positively to society.

Warm regards,

Harish Vatsa

entry.title: Re: The file " is not open, error in source sysem
entry.content: When you run manually it's working and with PC not working means, you could try changing the process chain execution user from system user to your ID and try. Here is how you can change user for execution in PC. Open PC in RSPC, goto menu options Process Chain -> Attributes -> Execution User -> Special User (give your ID) and activate.

entry.title: Convert a Smart Table Column Data to clickable actions in Fiori Elements Custom Card
entry.content:
HI,

I have a custom card in SAP FIORI Overview page . 

Card has a smart table with columns rendered via CDS view where in one of the column i need to convert the text to clickable actions.

My data from CDS looks like "Google,SAP" or "SAP" .

How can i convert these data to clickable actions .

My table extension code looks like below 

  onInit:function{
oSmartTable = this.getView().byId('LineItemsSmartTable');
                    oSmartTable.attachBeforeRebindTable(this.extendColumn.bind(this));
}
extentColumn:function(){
const oMultiStatusColumn = aColumns.find((col) => col.getLabel().getText() === "MultiStatusColumn");
var oMultiStatusColumnTemplate = new sap.m.HBox({
                        items: {
                            path: "MultiStatusColumn",
                            formatter: this.formatLinks.bind(this)
                        }
                    });
                 oMultiStatusColumn.setTemplate(oMultiStatusColumnTemplate);
}
formatLinks: function (sValue) {
                    if (!sValue) return [];
                    var aValues = sValue.split(", "); 
                    return aValues.map(function (sText) {
                        return new sap.m.Link({
                            text: sText,
                            press: function () {
                                sap.m.URLHelper.redirect(sText, true); 
                            }
                        });
                    });
                }
}

 This code throws either a missing template error or a List Binding error .

Any Suggestions or workaround for this scenario @pmuessig @Edrilan_Berisha 

Thanks,

Abhi

entry.title: #CoE #DH01 how to know which Fiori app is used by which userid.

It is very inappropreate from viewpoint of system audit because user use not . ransaction codes but Fiori application Is there any way to know  which Fiori app is used by which userid?

entry.title: Quota issue
entry.content:
How to fix below issue

Failed Operation
Start
On Step
Create VMs
Cloud Provider
Google Cloud Platform
Message
{ "errors": [ { "code": "QUOTA_EXCEEDED", "errorDetails": [ { "quotaInfo": { "dimensions": { "global": "global" }, "limit": 32.0, "limitName": "CPUS-ALL-REGIONS-per-project", "metricName": "compute.googleapis.com/cpus_all_regions" } } ], "message": "Quota 'CPUS_ALL_REGIONS' exceeded. Limit: 32.0 globally." } ] }

entry.title: Re: Identity Authentication Activation in Build Work Zone...
entry.content:
This step is unnecessary now; for new subscriptions Identity Authentication is the default setting. You can verify by open a site. It directs to login using IAS, does it not? 

What's New for SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Do not allow to do the Putaway for the HU , if the GR is not done

entry.title: Re: Subject : My requirement is Excel file upload in Buil...
entry.content:
Hi,

On the UI side: -

1) File upload component: link

2) Table/List: to show the Excel data before uploading

Then in the controller for reading Order details data:
1) Use a library like 'SheetJS' to read and convert the Excel data.

onUpload: function (oEvent) {
            var oFileUploader = oEvent.getSource();
            var oFile = oFileUploader.oFileUpload.files[0];  // Get the uploaded file

            if (!oFile) {
                sap.m.MessageToast.show("Please upload an Excel file!");
                return;
            }

            var reader = new FileReader();
            var that = this;

            reader.onload = function (e) {
                var data = e.target.result;
                
                // Read workbook
                var workbook = XLSX.read(data, { type: 'binary' });

                // Get first sheet name
                var sheetName = workbook.SheetNames[0];

                // Convert sheet to JSON
                var sheetData = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(workbook.Sheets[sheetName]);

                // Set the parsed JSON to the model
                that.getView().getModel().setData({ excelData: sheetData });
                that.getView().getModel().refresh();
            };

            // Read file as binary string
            reader.readAsBinaryString(oFile);
        }

Plese remember to place xlsx.js in Your Project(webapp/libs/)

For the API part, please see some reference, link

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.title: Re: Multiple lines in story report for compensation
entry.content:
Hi @ishaqyousuf,

I am facing the same issue right now. Did you find a solution for that?

entry.title: Re: Question about user locked
entry.content:
Dear Guido,

This Temporary Locked - Error is faced due to Throttling.

3 consecutive wrong password attempts will result in throttling.

Throttling is added after 3rd unsuccessful login attempt for given IP address and principal and is valid for 60seconds.
So if within these 60seconds they try again it will fail again.

Hence, when you face this Temporary Locked Error due to unsuccessful authentication - please wait for some minutes & later try with correct credentials. 

Hope this helps!

Thanks

Shubham

entry.title: Re: Connection from BTP ABAP System to PostgreSQL DB via...
entry.content:
I dont think it is possible to connect any DB in SAP BTP ABAP with ODBC connection. You can though consume any DB indirectly in SAP BTP ABAP by exposing it via REST APIs. i.e. build REST APIS in Java/python over the DB and then use these REST APIS in SAP BTP ABAP. 

Regards

Vishal Kapoor

entry.title: Re: can we close OSS opened from 2023 and 2024
entry.content: Please refer to KBA 1239839 - How to Close a Support Case - SAP for Me to close these cases accordingly

entry.title: Re: Table contents shifting on next page in smartforms
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I found the solution, if I mention the minimum height of the table, then all the contents of the table will be only printed when there is enough space (as much as minimum height provided) on page. Hence, all contents of table will be displayed together only.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Sale and leaseback process
entry.content:
Hi,

OSS Note 2662137 point “2. What kind of support is available for mapping the sale and lease back?” describe what is supported in SAP and what not related to this process. 

To set the RoU value you should create a condition having condition purpose = “one time statistical posting”. Assign to it “Condition Valuation Property” = F-Net worth value specified”. 

Dan

entry.title: Re: Notification types in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello @hamza07 

For phase based maintenance we have two notification types Y1 &Y2. With the current SAP S/4HANA cloud public edition, it is not yet possible to create custom notification types.

Yes default notification type is Y1 but you can adapt UI for app Create Maintenance Request to have the notification type field in the screen where you can choose the notification type while creating the maintenance request.

Hope this is helpful.

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Re: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - See...
entry.content:
Hi Kavyasri,

It's recommended to consult your university's office (where you are pursuing Masters) and explore SAP's official channels(tie-ups) for the most current information on available programs.

Yes, SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud and SAP Certified Associate - SAP Fiori Application Developer certifications can significantly enhance your credentials in SAP.

Discount on Certification: SAP offers the CERS01 - One SAP Certification Exam for Students, providing a discounted exam attempt for current students and instructors of higher academic institutions. Eligibility requires submission of a valid matriculation document. link

And like Tom had mentioned above, Learning Hub offers great start on lot of recent offerings (combined with developer tutorials, link)

Also, here at SCN, practice questions and study tips are available.

For the feedback on experience, please see the related postings on some networking platforms, example

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.title: I want to change the profit center of a sales document by item in Manage Substitution/Validation Rul
entry.content:
Manage Substitution/Validation Rules > Business Context
Profit Center Derivation in Sales Documents > Substitution Type: Substitute with field/function cannot be used

I can only use Substitute with Content

○What I want to do
I want the profit center of the details at the time of order to be "Sales office code + item profit center"

Please let me know the following:
1. Can it be used depending on how it's used?
2. How to use it
3. Is it scheduled to be released in the future?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Filter query not working after setting target specifi...
entry.content:
In our case also search functionality is working fine for ListPicker but it is case sensitive. We want it to be case insensitive.
i.e irrespective of characters entered (lowercase or uppercase) search result should get populated.

entry.title: Re: How to have different welcome emails for Onboarding i...
entry.content:
Hello William!

We had the same requirement to seperate the emails based on the Legal Entity. However just like you we couldn't based on the Legal Entity.

The workaround for us was to separete it based on the division attribute, so we had to add all the divisions in the IPS tranformation one of the Legal Entitys. The condition looks like the following for exsample: ($.division == 'XY') || ($.division == 'XY') etc..

You have to do it only one of the Legal Entitys because if the condition above is false the other one will run and a different email will be sent to the onboardee.

Let me know if this helped.

 

Best Regards,
Soma

Waldemar

entry.title: Sales document type ZTA cannot be invoiced with billing type ZF2.

entry.title: Can i connect to two different sap s4 hana public cloud tenants in a single sap datasphere tenant?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am setting up a SAP Datasphere system , right now there are 2 source system(S/4 HANA Public Cloud- Dev & Test). S/4 HANA Prod tenant is not yet live. Now the GO live is planned on first week of May, but the organization needs the reports from SAP DSP on Go Live Week itself. So for testing purpose is it prescribed to connect both the Dev & Test system to SAP DSP and configure 2 different space and import the models in between?

The Test Tenant has good data which will help to test out the reports?

 

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Tanumay.

SAP Datasphere SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Test post
Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @yury_sichov 

Had the same problem two weeks ago when installing the new license file. 

My workaround was to manually replace the hardware key from the generated file with the hardware key that the system is expecting (from the error message i.e.)

After this the system accepted the newly generated license.

Florin

Hi everyone.

We have updated PaPM On-Premise to SP23. When I try to download new environments and versions, I get errors:

What could be the problem? The combinations are correct.

entry.title: Re: Filter query not working after setting target specifi...
entry.content:
MDK 24.11 introduced enhanced search capabilities in metadata.  One of those is to set the search Case Sensitivity to true or false.  This simplifies your application to not need a rule to handle this scenario.  Are you using this feature?  If not the What's New details the search enhancements.

From the What's New:

We have enhanced the built-in search to support:

  • Additional Properties: Expands search functionality to include properties that are not directly bound.
  • Case Sensitivity: Enable case-sensitive search support in Offline OData.
  • Contains Search: Supports the use of the contains function in Offline OData V4.
  • Numeric Search: Enhances the MDK Search feature to accommodate numeric properties.

entry.title: Why dont DB02 Current Statements show anything?
entry.content: Why dont DB02 Current Statements show anything?

entry.title: Re: Print for multiple vendors in FBL1N
entry.content: please set the layout without subtotal and save the layout，then the printing will be out continuously

entry.title: How to improve replication in sap system during system refresh
entry.content:
Hi Team, Greetings!We are planning to refresh our satellite or source systems CAG(AFS), CBG(BW), CRG(RET)Post refresh, we will be replicating data from these source systems to PERSON_NAME Cloud.AFS- 286 tables to be replicated >> this will take 3 days.BW - 45 tables to be replicated >> Not more than half day.RET - 452 tables to be replicated >> This will take 5 days.Currently we have another project coming and we have a tight schedule and need to ensure all these replication finishes as soon as possible.Previously we were following below approach:Start with replication of AFS first, once done, deactivate the config and then start with replication of RET.When we performed replication for AFS and RET in parallel, we observed that it took more time.Could you let us know what would be the best approach to get these replications completed sooner.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to improve replication in sap system during syste...
entry.content:
To optimize the replication process and ensure it finishes as soon as possible, you can consider the following approach:
Parallel Replication with Resource Management

  1. Resource Allocation:

    • AFS: Allocate sufficient resources to handle the replication of 286 tables. Since this takes 3 days, ensure that the system can handle the load without significant performance degradation.
    • BW: Since BW has only 45 tables and takes less than half a day, you can allocate minimal resources to this process. It can be done in parallel with other replications without much impact.
    • RET: Allocate resources to handle the replication of 452 tables. This process takes 5 days, so ensure that the system can manage this load effectively.

  2. Staggered Start Times:

    • Day 1: Start the replication of AFS and BW simultaneously. Since BW takes less than half a day, it will complete quickly, freeing up resources.
    • Day 2: Continue with AFS replication. Once BW is completed, start the replication of RET. This way, RET can utilize the resources freed up by BW.
    • Day 3: Continue with AFS and RET replication.
    • Day 4: AFS replication should be completed. Now, RET can utilize all the resources previously allocated to AFS.
    • Day 5: Continue with RET replication.
    • Day 6: RET replication should be completed.

entry.title: POSTMANでSAP BTPのAPIをテストする方法
entry.content:
何名かの方が似たようなことを解説していますが、それらを見てもあまり掲載されていないパターンについても備忘録として書いておきたいと思います。

 

SAP BTPでは大半のAPIはOAuth2.0の認証を経由して扱います。大凡のサービスでは
１.サービスのインスタンスを作成する
２.サービスキーを発行する
という作業を行うことで、２で発行されたサービスキーの中にAuth2,0のトークン取得に必要な情報が含まれます。これらの作業はブースターでサービスをセットアップした場合、ブースターによって自動で行われることがあります。
例えばSAP Build Process Automationの場合はブースターによるセットアップでsap_process_automationというインスタンスが作成され、サービスキーも作成されます。
サービスキーの中身は以下のようになるかと思います。
{
  "endpoints": {
    "api": "https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com"
  },
  "html5-apps-repo": {
    "app_host_id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7g8h-i9j0-k1l2m3n4o5p6,q7r8s9t0-u1v2-w3x4-y5z6-a7b8c9d0e1f2,g3h4i5j6-k7l8-m9n0-o1p2-q3r4s5t6u7v8,w9x0y1z2-a3b4-c5d6-e7f8-g9h0i1j2k3l4"
  },
  "saasregistryenabled": true,
  "sap.cloud.service": "com.sap.spa.processautomation",
  "sap.cloud.service.alias": "spa",
  "uaa": {
    "clientid": "aBcDeFgH-IjKl-MnOp-QrSt-UvWxYz123456",
    "clientsecret": "AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz1234567890abcdefGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz",
    "url": "https://randomzone1234.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "identityzone": "randomzone1234",
    "identityzoneid": "abcd1234-efgh-5678-ijkl-90mnopqrstuv",
    "tenantid": "wxyz5678-abcd-1234-efgh-90mnopqrstuv",
    "tenantmode": "shared",
    "sburl": "https://internal-xsuaa.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "apiurl": "https://api.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "verificationkey": "-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----\nMIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAr+An9r5+9MI5Jp0+sIcT\nijGDdGlRnOKXeEK1Dk1PuYGqohTORJRFtMDfZE+OnVnW8CbcP4iSogMECkVEwn2w\nutCg57/txD4NcSwU25d9uUwsWKjw3TiGpvwJDBOm291FpCRABqD9W2kiw4PxL9d4\nVHQrK0dhczC/sgN67zLB80BwvJNv2VUY09R+6gNPiTiwO1CA5sHcRUzdIOikuXqW\n8/TFKvRd4Qq1Gem2LwJ9WwnW4b9Njzs3jZwBCCMqWXy02YYJd/m2UHa/iSIAy3kJ\ndetODMJ/209uPH+FIOrtrqwW0cQ0BvnMZ4RWXBcvbc+hnkqVJ+YPwT6/D8Dd3u5K\n8QIDAQAB\n-----END PUBLIC KEY-----",
    "xsappname": "11f3c240-ce16-4b66-ade6-52310b90b2b7!b141614|xsuaa!b120249",
    "subaccountid": "mnopqr12-stuv-3456-wxyz-7890abcdefghij",
    "uaadomain": "authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "zoneid": "ijkl5678-mnop-1234-abcd-90qrstuvwxyz",
    "credential-type": "binding-secret",
    "serviceInstanceId": "qrstuvwx-1234-yzab-cdef-ghijklmnopqr"
  }
}

注）これは例のために乱数を用いて書き換えてありますのでそのまま入力しても動きません。
まず、これらの情報を用いてトークンを取得することが必要です。これはPOSTMANでは以下のようにして行います。

メソッドとしてはGETを使用し、URLの欄にはサービスキーのJSONのuaa.urlを貼り付けます。
そして、このURLに”/oauth/token"を付与してください。
ParamにはKeyとしてgrant_type、Valueとしてclient_credentialsを設定します。（これによりURLの欄には?grant_type=client_credentialsが追加されます。）

AuthorizationではAuthTypeとしてBasic Authentication、Usernameとしてサービスキーのuaa.clientid、Passwordとしてuaa.clientsecretを設定します。

これでSendボタンをクリックすると、下記のような項目が返されます。

このaccess_tokenの値がAPIにアクセスする際に必要なトークンです。

さて、ここからが意外と情報がないなと思ったところの解説ですが、上記のトークンはサービスキーのclientidとclientsecretの情報から作成されたトークンです。そのためこのトークンはアクセスするサービスのシステムユーザーのようなユーザーで作られたトークンとなります。例えばこの方法でSAP Build Process AutomationのAPIを使用するためのトークンを取得し、ワークフロープロセスを開始するAPIを実行すると、プロセスはsb-clonexxxxxxというシステムユーザーで開始されます。

トークンにはユーザーの情報が含まれ、実際のAPI実行時にはそのユーザーに割り当てられたロールコレクションにより実行できる・出来ないや返される情報が変化することがあります。そのためテストでもユーザー情報を含んだトークンを取得したいところです。

トークンを取得する際にユーザーの情報を含めたい場合は以下のようにします。

まず、メソッドとしてPOSTを指定します。その他のclientidとclientsecret等の値はx-www-form-urlencodedを指定したBODYで指定します。grant_typeとしてpasswordを指定し、usernameとpasswordにそのユーザーのユーザー名とパスワードを入力します。これで返されるトークンはそのユーザーの情報が含まれる形になります。

このとき、ユーザー名とパスワードによる認証はdefault Idpにより行われます。

上記スナップショットのようにBTPサブアカウントにcustom Idpを設定している状態で、username/passwordによる認証をcustom Idpの方で行いたい場合は

このようにKeyにlogin_hint、Valueに{"origin":"sap.custom"}を追加します。valueの中身のsap.customはBTP CockpitのSecurity->Trust ConfigurationでOrigin Keyとして表示されている値です。使用したいIdPのOrigin Keyを設定してください。それによりそのIdPで認証が行われます。

キーを取得すればAPIを使用できます。
URLやHTTPメソッドはSAP Business Accelerator Hubに記載がありますのでそれに従います。

重要なのがAuthorizationでAuthTypeとしてBearerを指定し、そこに先程までの手順で取得したトークンを入力することです。これでAPIを実行することが出来ます。

custom Idpのユーザーを使用しての接続方法が意外と公開されていないなと思ったので公開しておきます。テストに役立ててください。

entry.title: Re: SE16H outer join query
entry.content:
Hi, I guess I am late but I will answer anyway.

CONSTANT is used secondary method . For that method is necessary to provide the exact value that has to be to be filtered in the secondary table to show in the REFERENCE/CONSTANT field. In this case the rows could be:

GJHAR             CONSTANT            2022
BUKRS             CONSTANT            AAA
BELNR             CONSTANT            12345678

That will show exacty the same information for every row.

If what is wanted is to relate every row of BKPF to a row of BSEG the method REFERENCE is used. Then in REFERENCE/CONSTANT goes the name of the field in the "source" table (usually there is only one, the primary table, but sap offers the option to join several tables among them so it is possible to have a table, join it with an intermidate one and use some of its fields as keys to the third) and in the FROM TABLE the source table is specified. In this case the rows would be:
GJHAR             REFERENCE            GJHAR        BSEG
BUKRS             REFERENCE            BUKRS        BSEG
BELNR             REFERENCE            BELNR        BSEG

entry.title: Re: Plant not appearing while creating new service organi...
entry.content:
Hi @DavidTabery,

Sorry for the late reply. Thank you for the solution provided. As the object 'service organization' is new to us, we haven't found the need to create a separate purchasing organization for every plant till date. So, first we would like to study the impact of having just one plant in all the service organizations, while creating a project where purchase orders are created for a different plant. If it goes well, then I feel we will continue this way. Otherwise, as you explained, we will create a separate purchasing organization for every plant. Thanks again.

entry.title: Re: The file " is not open, error in source sysem
entry.content: i have checked the path to execute my id, its hidden , i cant give my user id

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Dear @Fl0r1n and @yury_sichov 

thanks for using SAP Cloud Developer Trail 🙂
Regarding the "issue" with the changing HW keys: there is no issue at all.
Every time you restart your container it MAY get indeed a new HW key.
But: the licensing mechanism inside the SAP stack will determine if there is a valid license and will update the relationship "HW key <> valid license" inside SLICENSE.

See this example I had performed some days ago:

1.) There was a license before with this maschine data:
----- Begin SAP License -----
SAPSYSTEM=A4H
HARDWARE-KEY=I1028913049
INSTNO=DEMOSYSTEM
BEGIN=20250330
EXPIRATION=20250630

2.) After this step, I stopped the container, did an update of docker desktop software and re-started the container.

3.) During the container start, the HW key changed to S0898059505

4.) Finally, if you check with SLICENSE....

... you will find the "overall" license still valid even the license was issued for another HW key 😊

Conclusion:
If you have a valid license, changing the HW key will not invalidate the license.
But be careful: this rule only valid in this scenario;)

Please check your SLICENSE information and post it here for further investigation. The image is nearly 6 month on the market and had been downloaded many times.

Small hint for free: Please kindly check:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/abap-cloud-developer-trial-2022-available-now/ba-p/13598069
(this is THIS document) -> Section "ABAP License" how to extend the license.


Best,
Stephan
SAP - ABAP Cloud Developer Trial Team

entry.title: Re: Printing GL line item detail - FAGLL03
entry.content: please remove subtotal from the layout，then save it and printing is out continously

entry.title: IRN/QR Code Missing from XML for Direct FI Invoices - India GST Integration
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a Professional Services subscription.

For customer invoicing via the SD route (Project Systems), we use the Create Billing Document application. After generating the billing document, we submit the invoice through the eDocument Cockpit application. Upon submission, the system updates the invoice details in the India GST portal and retrieves the IRN and QR code details for Indian invoices. These details are then included in the invoice document’s XML file, which we use to update the invoice output form.

 

Direct FI Invoices:

  •        Invoices are created via "Create Outgoing Invoices" and submitted through "eDocument Cockpit."
  •        However, the resulting XML file lacks the IRN and QR code details.

We need to customize the output form for these Direct FI invoices and require the IRN and QR code details.

To extract the XML for analysis, we:

  1. Opened "Create Correspondence."
  2. Appended ?DownloadXML=true to the URL.
  3. Entered required data.
  4. Downloaded the XML.

Questions:

  1. How can we retrieve the IRN and QR code for Direct FI invoices in the XML?
  2. Is there documentation available for customizing Direct FI invoice output forms?

entry.title: Re: Reset or reset and reverse case in relation with paym...
entry.content:
Hi, Thank you for your question.

To reverse a document, you can use the Manage Journal Entries app: Copy, Edit, and Reverse Journal Entries 

To reset a payment, you can find it in the Manage Automatic Payments app, and use the Delete Output button to delete output first and then reset the payment. For more information, see Reset Payment Runs in the Manage Automatic Payments App .

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: How to import currency conversion data from SAP BW/4 to SAC?
entry.content:
Hello William,
Is there a standard SAP BW Query which can be used? Or a custom one should be created? If a custom query, how it should be done?
Are there any specific settings for the query itself?
Can you please brief me more about the query which should be used?
Thank you!

entry.title: Email functionality in RAP for i_salesordertp in change event gives dump
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 We have a requirement to send an email when the sales order is released. We have found an event Change in the BO i_Salesordertp. This is the class we have created

 

CLASS zcl_sales_order_event_handler DEFINITION

PUBLIC

ABSTRACT

FINAL

FOR EVENTS OF i_salesordertp.

 

PUBLIC SECTION.

PROTECTED SECTION.

PRIVATE SECTION.

ENDCLASS.

 

 

Local types :

 

LASS lcl_so_event_consumption DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_event_handler.

 

PRIVATE SECTION.

METHODS:

so_change_consume FOR ENTITY EVENT event_parameters FOR salesorder~changed.

 

ENDCLASS.

 

CLASS lcl_so_event_consumption IMPLEMENTATION.

 

METHOD so_change_consume.

 

READ ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp

IN LOCAL MODE

ENTITY salesorder

ALL FIELDS WITH

CORRESPONDING #( event_parameters )

RESULT FINAL(sales_orders)

FAILED FINAL(failed)

REPORTED FINAL(reported).

 

" get so release details

DATA: sales_order_range TYPE RANGE OF zso_release_noti-sales_order.

sales_order_range = VALUE #(

FOR so IN sales_orders

sign = 'I' option = 'EQ'

( low = so-salesorder )

).

 

SELECT

FROM zso_release_noti

FIELDS *

WHERE sales_order IN @sales_order_range

INTO TABLE @DATA(so_release_details).

 

LOOP AT sales_orders INTO DATA(sales_order).

 

DATA(release_detail) = VALUE #( so_release_details[ sales_order = sales_order-salesorder ] OPTIONAL ).

 

" when SO Approval status is Released and no release details found

IF sales_order-salesdocapprovalstatus = zif_sales_order=>sales_doc_approval_status-released AND

release_detail IS INITIAL.

 

" retrieve PO Details

DATA(po_number) = sales_order-purchaseorderbycustomer.

DATA(po_date) = sales_order-customerpurchaseorderdate.

 

SELECT SINGLE

FROM i_user

FIELDS \_addrcurdefaultemailaddress-emailaddress

WHERE userid = @sales_order-createdbyuser

INTO @DATA(so_created_by_email).

 

 

SELECT SINGLE

FROM i_buspartemailaddresstp_3

FIELDS emailaddress

WHERE businesspartner = @sales_order-soldtoparty

INTO @DATA(sold_to_party_email).

 

so_created_by_email = 'akilk@deloitte.com'.

sold_to_party_email = 'sdas25@deloitte.com'.

 

DATA: mail_content TYPE REF TO cl_bcs_mail_textpart.

 

DATA(body_content) =

|<p>Dear Sir/Madam,</p>| && |<br/>| &&

|<br/>| &&

|<p>This email serves to acknowledge that we have received your purchase order.</p>| && |<br/>| &&

|<p>PO: { po_number }</p>| && |<br/>| &&

|<p>PO Date: { po_date }</p>| && |<br/>| &&

|<p>We sincerely thank you for your business and value your partnership.</p>| && |<br/>| &&

|<br/>| &&

|<p>Best Regards,</p><br/>| &&

|<p>Vinati Organics Limited</p>|.

 

mail_content = cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_text_html(

iv_content = body_content

).

 

* zcl_email_utility=>send_async(

* sender = CONV #( so_created_by_email )

* receivers = VALUE #(

* ( address = sold_to_party_email copy = cl_bcs_mail_message=>to )

* )

* subject = 'Purchase Order Acknowledgement Email'

* content = mail_content

* ).

 

DATA(lv_destination) = 'NONE'.

 

CALL FUNCTION 'Z_FM_SO_EMAIL'

DESTINATION lv_destination

EXPORTING

sender = so_created_by_email

receiver = sold_to_party_email

subject = 'Purchase Order Acknowledgement Email'

content = body_content.

 

DATA:

lo_operation TYPE REF TO if_bgmc_op_single,

lo_process TYPE REF TO if_bgmc_process_single_op,

lo_process_factory TYPE REF TO if_bgmc_process_factory,

lo_process_monitor TYPE REF TO if_bgmc_process_monitor,

lx_bgmc TYPE REF TO cx_bgmc.

 

lo_operation = NEW zcl_so_bgpf_operation_contr(

VALUE #(

sender = so_created_by_email

receivers = VALUE #(

( address = sold_to_party_email copy = cl_bcs_mail_message=>to )

)

subject = 'Purchase Order Acknowledgement Email'

content = mail_content

)

).

 

TRY.

lo_process_factory = cl_bgmc_process_factory=>get_default( ).

lo_process = lo_process_factory->create( ).

lo_process->set_name( |Email for SO Release of { sales_order-salesorder }| )->set_operation( lo_operation ).

* lo_process_monitor = lo_process->save_for_execution( ).

 

CATCH cx_bgmc INTO lx_bgmc.

DATA(lv_error_result) = lx_bgmc->get_longtext( ).

ENDTRY.

 

" create release details for future validation

" TODO: handle bgPF errors and update table accordingly

DATA(new_release_detail) = VALUE zso_release_noti(

is_released = abap_true

sales_order = sales_order-salesorder

).

INSERT zso_release_noti FROM @new_release_detail.

 

ENDIF.

 

ENDLOOP.

 

ENDMETHOD.

 

ENDCLASS.

 

We have tried all the possible ways by calling the RFC using destination NONE but it gives an error.

Also we tried calling it using BGRFC and that also dump saying illegal statement encountered.

We commented the code for * lo_process_monitor = lo_process->save_for_execution( ). it avoided the dump but

email is not getting triggered. I know std would have a commit work calling later in the save phase but does not seem to be working.

Source codesnippet

Can somebody guide on what else cane be done to achieve this requirement. Thanks !

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Input Field Locked With Busy Indicator...
entry.content:
We had the exact same problem. We solved it by updating the UI5 framework. We had version 1.108.0 and updated to the latest version, 1.108.41.

https://learning.sap.com/videos/patching-sap-fiori-sapui5-

https://me.sap.com/notes/3155948

entry.title: How to test APIs in Postman by specifying a user?
entry.content:
Several people have explained similar topics, but I would like to write this down as a memo to cover patterns that are not often mentioned.
 
In SAP BTP, most APIs are handled via OAuth 2.0 authentication. For most services, the following steps are typically performed:
1. Create a service instance
2. Generate a service key
By performing these steps, the service key generated in step 2 will contain the information necessary to obtain an OAuth 2.0 token. When setting up services using a booster, these steps may be automatically performed by the booster.
For example, in the case of SAP Build Process Automation, setting up through a booster will create an instance called `sap_process_automation`, and a service key will also be generated.
The contents of the service key might look something like this:
{
  "endpoints": {
    "api": "https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com"
  },
  "html5-apps-repo": {
    "app_host_id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7g8h-i9j0-k1l2m3n4o5p6,q7r8s9t0-u1v2-w3x4-y5z6-a7b8c9d0e1f2,g3h4i5j6-k7l8-m9n0-o1p2-q3r4s5t6u7v8,w9x0y1z2-a3b4-c5d6-e7f8-g9h0i1j2k3l4"
  },
  "saasregistryenabled": true,
  "sap.cloud.service": "com.sap.spa.processautomation",
  "sap.cloud.service.alias": "spa",
  "uaa": {
    "clientid": "aBcDeFgH-IjKl-MnOp-QrSt-UvWxYz123456",
    "clientsecret": "AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz1234567890abcdefGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz",
    "url": "https://randomzone1234.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "identityzone": "randomzone1234",
    "identityzoneid": "abcd1234-efgh-5678-ijkl-90mnopqrstuv",
    "tenantid": "wxyz5678-abcd-1234-efgh-90mnopqrstuv",
    "tenantmode": "shared",
    "sburl": "https://internal-xsuaa.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "apiurl": "https://api.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "verificationkey": "-----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----\nMIIBIjANBgkqhkiG9w0BAQEFAAOCAQ8AMIIBCgKCAQEAr+An9r5+9MI5Jp0+sIcT\nijGDdGlRnOKXeEK1Dk1PuYGqohTORJRFtMDfZE+OnVnW8CbcP4iSogMECkVEwn2w\nutCg57/txD4NcSwU25d9uUwsWKjw3TiGpvwJDBOm291FpCRABqD9W2kiw4PxL9d4\nVHQrK0dhczC/sgN67zLB80BwvJNv2VUY09R+6gNPiTiwO1CA5sHcRUzdIOikuXqW\n8/TFKvRd4Qq1Gem2LwJ9WwnW4b9Njzs3jZwBCCMqWXy02YYJd/m2UHa/iSIAy3kJ\ndetODMJ/209uPH+FIOrtrqwW0cQ0BvnMZ4RWXBcvbc+hnkqVJ+YPwT6/D8Dd3u5K\n8QIDAQAB\n-----END PUBLIC KEY-----",
    "xsappname": "11f3c240-ce16-4b66-ade6-52310b90b2b7!b141614|xsuaa!b120249",
    "subaccountid": "mnopqr12-stuv-3456-wxyz-7890abcdefghij",
    "uaadomain": "authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "zoneid": "ijkl5678-mnop-1234-abcd-90qrstuvwxyz",
    "credential-type": "binding-secret",
    "serviceInstanceId": "qrstuvwx-1234-yzab-cdef-ghijklmnopqr"
  }
}

Note: This has been rewritten using random values for the sake of example, so it will not work even if entered as is
First, it is necessary to obtain a token using this information. In POSTMAN, this can be done as follows:
For the method, use GET, and paste the `uaa.url` from the service key JSON into the URL field.
Then, append `"/oauth/token"` to this URL.
In the Params section, set the following:
• Key: `grant_type`
• Value: `client_credentials`
(This will add `?grant_type=client_credentials` to the URL field.)

 

In the Authorization section, set the AuthType to Basic Authentication, and configure the following:
• Username: `uaa.clientid` from the service key
• Password: `uaa.clientsecret` from the service key
Once this is set, click the Send button, and you will receive a response with items similar to the following:

 

The value of this `access_token` is the token required to access the API.


Now, here is an explanation of something that surprisingly lacks information. The token mentioned above is created using the `clientid` and `clientsecret` information from the service key. Therefore, this token is essentially a token created for a system user of the service being accessed. For example, if you use this method to obtain a token for SAP Build Process Automation’s API and execute an API to start a workflow process, the process will be initiated by a system user such as `sb-clonexxxxxx`.

Tokens contain user information, and during actual API execution, the roles assigned to that user through role collections may affect what can or cannot be executed, as well as the information returned. Therefore, even in testing, it is preferable to obtain a token that includes user information.
To include user information when obtaining a token, proceed as follows:

First, specify POST as the method. Other values, such as `clientid` and `clientsecret`, should be specified in the BODY section with the `x-www-form-urlencoded` format. Set `grant_type` to `password`, and enter the username and password of the user in the `username` and `password` fields. The token returned in this way will include the information of that user.
At this time, authentication using the username and password is performed by the default IdP (Identity Provider).

If you want username/password authentication to be performed by the custom IdP when a custom IdP is configured in the BTP subaccount, as shown in the above snapshot.

Add `login_hint` as the Key and `{"origin":"sap.custom"}` as the Value. The `sap.custom` inside the value corresponds to the Origin Key displayed under Security -> Trust Configuration in the BTP Cockpit. Set the Origin Key of the IdP you want to use. This ensures that authentication is performed by that specific IdP.


Once you have completed these steps and obtained the token, you can use it to access the API.
The URL and HTTP method are provided in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, so follow those instructions accordingly.

The important part is to specify Bearer as the AuthType in the Authorization section and input the token obtained from the previous steps. This allows you to execute the API.

I noticed that the method for connecting using a custom IdP user is not widely documented, so I decided to share it here. I hope this helps with your testing.

entry.title: ISSUE WITH MORE OPTIONS IN SAP BULD LOBBY
entry.content:
Hi SAP Build Community,

I am experiencing an issue where some options in the "More Options" menu are missing from my SAP Build project. Currently, I can only see:

  • Rename Project

  • Manage Members

  • Delete

However, I do not see other options like:

  • Publish to Library

  • Export

  • Save as New Project

Details:

  • My Roles: I have the following role collections assigned to my user account:

    • ProcessAutomationDeveloper

    • ProcessAutomationParticipant

    • ProcessAutomationAdmin

    • ProcessAutomationDelegate.Project Status: The project is in released mode.

      I believe I should have access to all menu options based on my roles, but they are still missing. Has anyone else experienced this issue, and how can I resolve it?

      Thanks in advance for your help!

Hi Amrita,

I am having a similar issue, did you find any solution to this?

BR,
Ossama

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:
Tuning and Memory Management

88416 - Zero administration memory management for the ABAP server - SAP for Me

2085980 - New features in memory management as of Kernel Release 7.40 - SAP for Me

3517086 - Non-Security Parameters for ABAP systems in SAP Enterprise Cloud Services (ECS) - SAP for Me

Pay attention to this..... you need to read all of these Notes and make sure your system is set up according to the Notes....

 

2469354 - Key Monitoring Metrics for SAP on IaaS Infrastructure - SAP for Me

2178632 - Key Monitoring Metrics for SAP on Microsoft Azure - SAP for Me

 

 

Convergent Mediation Systems & Digital Route hosted on SAP ECS RISE

3549985 - Best Practices and Boundary Conditions for Convergent Mediation Systems hosted in SAP ECS (RISE) - SAP for Me

There is a useful Best Practice guide attached

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CM_BY_DIGITALROUTE?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Coding for a "new product" button SAC
entry.content:
@Deb_D 

There is an example in the below blog towards the end which you can use as refrence.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-application-to-add-master-data-to-a-planning-model/ba-p/13522496

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: The file " is not open, error in source sysem
entry.content:
Set a debug loop in the chain for the infopackage step and run the chain. Then jump into the debugger and debug your code to see why the standard background user gets different result. 

Maybe it lacks some authorization.

entry.title: Re: BW Modeling opening aDSO error your bw modeling clien...
entry.content:
Update ADT and BW Modeling Tools to the latest version:
1944835 SAP BW Modeling Tools - Delivery Schedule

and clean up the local cache of your BW MT:
1971987 Deletion of local cache in BW modeling tools for Eclipse

entry.title: Re: The file " is not open, error in source sysem
entry.content: You can add it in edit mode. Looks like you are checking in display mode.

entry.title: Re: Release API-State Error "Retrieved API version of obj...
entry.content:
This is not a perfect solution, but a workaround that worked for me:

I had this problem when trying to add an API contract to an object in our custom namespace. However, when I recreated the object in the Z-namespace, I was able to add the API contract without problems.

It could be that the problem lies with our namespace definition or the software component we have defined, but I have not looked that far yet. For now I am just relying on the workaround.

entry.title: Re: Story Reports for Performance Form Competencies
entry.content: Technically, it's not duplicates. I guess it depends on how you built your query + can be influenced by those tags. Try to remove tags from the query

entry.title: Re: Deep entity search in Get Record Collection in SAP BU...
entry.content: I'm not an expert here, but from a little research it seems that OData V2 does not allow filtering based on nested property which is 1-to-many. I'm assuming that is your case.

entry.title: Re: Using CNMASS to change the system and user statuses
entry.content: Thanks, exactly what i searched for

entry.title: Penpot UI kit
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm UX designer working with SAP, and I'm currently transitioning to Penpot as my primary design tool. I've noticed that SAP provides the Fiori/S4HANA UI kits for Figma, but I couldn't find any official components library for Penpot. 

Are there any plans to make the UI kits available for Penpot? Or has anyone in the community successfully adapted the existing UI stencils for use in Penpot?

Looking forward to your insights!

entry.title: Datasphere: Transport connection from test system to prod
entry.content:
Hello,

We have two tenants in SAP Datasphere: one for the test system and one for the production system

When transporting a connected object (for example, a remote table) via export/import from one tenant to another, how can we change the connection from test to production?

Thanks.

entry.title: How to cancel Store order ID with Learning Hub subscription with wrong payment method
entry.content:
I have purchased a SP LH subscription on 31st Mar 2025. Unfortunately, I used my personal credit card whereas I was supposed to use my corporate card for payment. I need urgent help in cancelling this subscription. Can you please confirm if current payment will be reversed as the subscription is still not activated.

It will be problematic as I will not get any reimbursement from my current company as I have used my personal credit card. 

I have raised several cases with SAP store but no reply. I am stuck.

SAP Store Support Request :1000515294 this is the latest case raised

 

 

 @Margit_Wagner I see you already helped a lot of issues with Learning Hub. Could you please help with my case.

Thanks

Manidipa

entry.title: Inactive Objects to be maintained from SU24 without deleting within the role
entry.content:
Dear All,

We are facing a condition were we need to remove Inactive objects within the role. You can suggest us to delete or maintain it from SU24 with check indicator "NO". But either of the case is not acceptable and wanted to find if there is any new way for this. 

For more clarification: We maintain an object S_SECPOL for SU01 in SU24 for Security team and added in Role1. But the same object might not be necessary for Basis (in rare Basis user maintenance access) and added in Role 2 with S_SECPOL inactive. 

In this case for Role 2 we are not supposed to inactive S_SECPOL object either we cannot maintain check no for same transaction SU01 in SU24 as it might effect Role 1.

If there is any alternate, please suggest me.

Security

entry.title: WBS ELEMENT RELEASE WITH WORKFLOW
entry.content:
Required WBS element release approval 

WBS element release with workflow in sap public cloud any available workflow suggest

entry.title: Re: MDG. How to turn off auto replication of materials
entry.content: Hello

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to generate a requote only with the ad...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, when you need to add additional items to a service quotation that has been accepted, you can create a requote. Here is how it works:

Creating a Requote:

  • Initial Quotations: These are service quotations without any relation to predecessor quotations or orders. When accepted, they create a follow-up Service - Creating Requotes service order.
  • Requotes: These are created as follow-ups to existing service quotations related to service orders. Accepted items from the predecessor quotation are copied to the requote, allowing you to add new items.

Procedure:

  1. Open the latest related service quotation.
  2. Choose ‘Requote,’ which creates a new service quotation ID where accepted items are copied.
  3. Add the required new items to this service quotation.

Important Considerations:

  • Do not change existing items from the predecessor quotation: Any changes to quantities or other details of existing items will not be copied to the related service order when you accept the requote.
  • Requote focuses on adding new items while maintaining the connection to the initial quotation.

This process allows you to manage new items separately while keeping the relationship to the original service quotation intact.

For more details on processing requotes, refer to: Manage Service Quotations.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: MDG. How to turn off auto replication of materials
entry.content: Hello Saikat. Thank you. I looked at these notes. I also looked at the documents: https://d.dam.sap.com/x/MPGHrJo/How-To%20Using%20Data%20Replication%20Framework%20for%20Material%20V4.0.pdf?rc=19&inline=true There is nothing specifically about disabling replication triggered by changes in materials. Regarding your question "Why do you not want to replicate the changes done via backend transactions?", there are several reasons. With mass changes, IDs are automatically created not by the number of changed materials, but by the number of changes in each material. That is, when changing 10 materials, we can have 1000 IDs of the MATMAS type. There is also a problem that I wrote about above, when adding a replication step in BRF+, double replication is performed: automatic and in accordance with the step in BRF+, this is very annoying

entry.title: Re: Custom field with Trial Balance API
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the same question. Did you find a solution for your requirement ?

Thank You

entry.title: Assistance Required for Assigning Responsible Person to WBS Element Milestone in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
we are unable to assign the responsible person to the required WBS element milestone within the system.

Could you kindly guide us on the appropriate steps or provide any suggestions on how to resolve this issue? If there are specific configurations or settings that need to be adjusted, we would appreciate your insights.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: MI31
entry.content: At Step 5 I'm not getting any system information messages or errors. Please advise how to proceed from here.

entry.title: Re: Access Control on CDS view not working
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use SACMSEL - to check if this authorization is run on CDS side. 
SDDLAR - to do the data preview and check what You can see there 

But I would like to see Your ABAP Code where You select from CDS - because probably You are missing with_privilages when requesting data from CDS. 

Something like this: SELECT zzz FROM yyy WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS INTO TABLE vvv

Good Luck!

entry.title: Re: Email functionality in RAP for i_salesordertp in chan...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can check the following:

1. You need to check the RFC destination, whether it can be called successfully. It could be that the destination is not maintained correctly.

2. You need to check the trigger separately. You can debug whether the trigger action can be triggered. 

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Overflow during the arithmetic operation type P in program SAPLJ1I4 during MIRO
entry.content: Overflow during the arithmetic operation type P in program SAPLJ1I4 in MIRO posting

entry.title: Re: Access Control on CDS view not working
entry.content: Something like this:

entry.title: Re: Access Control on CDS view not working
entry.content: Something like this: SELECT zzz FROM yyy WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS INTO TABLE

entry.title: Configured Destination using CAP service and its not showing in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Am creating my first Fiori app in BAS using CAPM service as backend. I have created a destination using CAPM service. First i have tried creating destination using https://XXX.hana.ondemand.com but got 404 error. Later https://XXX.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/XX tried using this url and connection response is 200.

But either of the ways am not able to see the destination while creating Fiori application. Experts, could you please help me with this case.

Regards, Sai Ram Dinesh Pallapotu

entry.title: Re: I want to change the profit center of a sales documen...
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently, the ‘Substitute with field/function’ option cannot Sales - Profit Center Determination be used directly for profit center derivation in sales documents. The available substitution method is ‘Substitute with Constant’. You want to derive the profit center using a combination of ‘Sales office code + item profit center’.

Answers to Your Questions

  1. Can it be used depending on how it’s used?

    • The current functionality does not allow using ‘Substitute with field/function’ for profit center derivation in sales documents. This means you cannot directly combine fields Profit Center
  2. Will it be possible in future release?
  • No such schedule. 

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Annotations with Dynamic values to make CRUD operatio...
entry.content:
What effect exactly are you looking for?

Only Delete button on list report may be disabled dynamically by values from an item: Create button is not linked with any item; so an item cannot influence it. There is no Edit button in List report. 

In version 1.120.28, Delete button does get disabled on List report with an expression like {$edmJson: {$Lt: [{$Path: 'starsValue'}, 3]}}.

entry.title: Asset Condition in AS01/AS02
entry.content:
Hello

I would like to enable the capturing of the condition of an asset in the master record, e.g. New, Fair, Damaged, etc. What options do I have to do that in the system? Please assist.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hello, @GerganaTsakova!

Does the latest release of the buildpack support .ear packaged applications?

entry.title: Re: Get transcation code or reference in s4 hana cloud BAdI
entry.content: Hi @bradly1618, i have the same requirement in another BAdI. Did you find a solution for your problem?

entry.title: Re: ISSUE WITH MORE OPTIONS IN SAP BULD LOBBY
entry.content:
These were moved to be available only for a version some time ago. 

Click on the Project to open the details on the right

Look for the version you want to act on in Versions tab in the details

The ... button here would have the actions you are looking for.

entry.title: Re: C+514 Internal error in function module CKM3_UPDATE
entry.content: Hi, thank you for your answer. However, I have already checked both notes (like I mentioned in the description) and none of them is applicable in my case.
